/CAL: MOTION TO DETAIN/VD: 05-25-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANTSHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMSIS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/WEAP/X: CURFEW ORDERED FROM6PM TO 5AM/X: DEFENDANT MUST CONTINUE TO ATTEND TRP/X: STIPULATED 10TH DAY IS 06-08-22/X: COURT ESTABLISHES 60TH DAY AS 7-11-22/CONTD: PRE HEARINGCONFERENCE/DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:1HR/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: DAVID HARRIOSN      /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 05-26-22 (10)/X: COURT ESTABLISHES 60TH DAY AS 07-11-22/NB/X: PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X: EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/CONTD: MOTION TO DETAIN ON 05-13-22/DOP//CONTD:  PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HR/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/STWPX/EMMOD: FROM 6AM-6PM DEFENDANT MAY TO TRAVEL TO STOCKTON ON 06-10-22/CONTD: MODIFACTION OF CURFEW/DAWF/
/CAL: PREHEARIUNG CONFERENCE/NTW60/LD: 07-11-22 (60)/VD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 06-03-22/CONTD: STATUS ON 06-03-22/DOP/
/CAL: MOTION TO DETAIN/DAWT/LDPX: 05-26-22 (10TH), 07-11-22 (60TH)/CONTD:MOTION TO DETAIN ON 05-13-22/DOP/
